title: Clavicular charged in shocking Everglades shooting stream, faces up to 1 year in jail
summary_full: Kick streamer Braden Eric Peters, also known as Clavicular, is in legal trouble. He is charged with unlawfully firing a gun in a public place. The incident occurred in the Florida Everglades during a livestream. Wildlife officials investigated the viral video. Peters' lawyers state he followed a guide's instructions and no harm occurred. The case highlights livestream consequences.
